observation: Amazon Egypt publishes a local Associates enrollment page for eligible bloggers, publishers, and creators with a qualifying website or app.
notes: Owner must still apply and receive approval; the build cannot create the account.

observation: The Amazon Egypt operating agreement requires properly formatted special tagged links supplied by the program for commission tracking.
notes: Direct Amazon URLs are not commission-ready until the owner's approved tag is applied through program tools.

observation: Amazon distinguishes program-supplied product data images text link formats tools and APIs from other content; the site should not scrape listing imagery or treat ordinary page assets as licensed program content.
notes: Use original site visuals now; replace only with permitted Program Content after approval and policy review.

observation: The current public noon Associate Marketing terms define the program territory as the UAE and Saudi Arabia; Egypt is not included in that definition.
notes: Treat noon Egypt links as direct retailer links and mark Egypt affiliate eligibility as owner verification required; do not promise noon Egypt commissions.

observation: noon may provide program content to approved associates and expressly prohibits automated scraping of its site.
notes: Do not scrape or redistribute noon Egypt listing images; keep source links and use original visuals.

observation: noon operates an Egypt storefront with current EGP product pages and local support details, independently of whether its public affiliate terms cover Egypt.
notes: Use for provider comparison and direct outbound links; keep affiliate status direct until program territory is confirmed.

observation: A current Egypt retailer guide targets hubs and desk accessories with price-led best-value labels and direct store CTAs, showing commercial interest but leaving room for an independent problem-first multi-provider methodology with compatibility and skip guidance.
notes: Inference is limited to the observable content pattern; no traffic or ranking claim is made.
